title: Oscar Predictions for an Unpredictable Year
text: The article predicts Anderson will claim the directing award, citing his film's dominant awards season performance. "One Battle After Another" secured both the Directors Guild Award and Producers Guild Award, which historically correlate strongly with Oscar outcomes. The piece notes that "five out of the past six Best Picture winners have also won Best Director," suggesting the categories typically align rather than split. Anderson's status as "a well-respected auteur who's never won an Oscar" strengthens his narrative advantage. However, some uncertainty remains. The article acknowledges a potential upset if "Sinners" wins Best Picture, though this scenario appears unlikely given the precursor award distribution heavily favors "One Battle After Another".
